executive_brief: CourseHub is a technical API platform designed for course management and student enrollment. It implements a role-based access control system for Students and Instructors, utilizing JWT Bearer tokens for session management. The system manages the lifecycle of courses and modules, student registration, and progress tracking through a set of RESTful endpoints.

architectural_constraints: ActiveEnrollmentConstraint: Course deletion rejected if active enrollments exist
Auto-completion: completed_at timestamp set automatically when progress reaches 100
Course must be published for student enrollment

maturity_assessment: The project requires REFINEMENT. While the technical API contracts and constraints are well-defined, there is a significant lack of high-level business context, specifically missing Goals & Objectives and a defined Scope, which leaves the systemic purpose and boundaries ambiguous.
critical_dependencies: JWT Bearer tokens for Authorization header
Unique email constraint for User registration
